TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == lunuk paculil a kazizeng Ťá™ŚčēťßēťßõśĪĹŤĽä lunuk paculil a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, Autonomous vehicles,Self-driving automobile", panganga aca tu naya ku tademay paculil a kazizeng, u tinnaw ku paculilay a kazizeng, nayay ku tademaw a kazizeng, kikayay a kazizang, anca lunuk paculil a kazizeng, zuma u tademaw ku paculilay anca caay pikuwn tu kazizeng. mala u sapisuped tu paya, lunuk paculil a kazizdng kapah cay ku tademaw ku paculilay taneng a mikinsa tu hekal atu mituzu' tu pazayzaan saculilan. Ťá™ŚčēťßēťßõśĪĹŤĽä(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Autonomous vehicles,Self-driving automobile), . nilaculan katukuh 2023 amihcaan, caay kahamin u lunuk paculil a kazizdng hamin u mahizaay tu u sapacakay, hatu u mahizaay tu nu kazizeng a hekal, u nipahecek a kazizeng, anca u sapaazih a kazizeng, zuma u nalimaan ku azihen kya misataneng misanga' tu mahizaay a kazizeng, haymaw hizahiza satu. lunuk paculil a kazizeng taneng tu lye-ta, kowng-sye lye-ta, sapikinsa,GPS atu piazih tu tennaw a nalimaan mikinsa tu hekal. macakatay a pikuwan taneng mikinsa tu nisulita masumad matatungus ku saculi a zazan, atu satena' a bacu. Pakay mahini a nipaeneng atu nisanga'an tu ti-tu "SLAM" a nalimaan, pabaluhay tu zuma a sakatineng a ti-tu, ngay tulin sa mikilul ku kazizeng tu kitizaan. maawas ku yadahay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng masa nayay paculilay tu kazizeng a sakaput taneng amiwada' tu ngelu', sakasa apacakat tu saculilan a kalamkam a miculu' a patayza. lunuk paculil a kazizeng u pikinsa talaayaw tu 1920 a ziday kya a taneng mikinsa, malaheci ku zuma. saayaway a tatenga'ay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng katukuh 1980 a mihcaan kya saayaway a tahkal. 1984 a mihcaan, K-ney-ci-melung aa atalakaway a cacudadan micuzuh tu Navlab atu ALV a nisabalucu'an, 1987 a mihcaan, Me-say-te-s-Pin-s atu Mu-ni-hey lyen-pang kukub hitay a talakaway a cacudadan mapulung micuzuh tu nisabalucu'an ni Yu-li-ka-pu-low-au-siw-s. Yadah ku ay a tabakiay a kusi atu migingkuway a sakaput malingatu tu misanga' tu mahizaay tu nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, pasu Me-say-te-sa pins, tung-yung kazizeng, Talu kazizeng, lAV, meyan, Law-puw.poe-s kusi, Zipun a nisanga'an a kazizeng,ley-now, Toyuta kazizeng, Aw-ti, bu-haw sakaput, paw-s kazizeng, pa-al-ma talakaway a cacudadanay a Vislab, niw-cin talakaway a cacudadan, atu Google. zikuz nu 21 seci, m ikilul tu sapasingding a macakat, bahal satu macakat, hamin u lunuk paculil a kazizeng mitanamay tu kazizengay u masan ga'ay tu, te-s-la a kazizeng u saayaway a nipanutekan a patahkal tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2013 a mihca 7 a bulad, 2013 a mihca 7 a bulad, Vislab paazih tu BRAiVE hananay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, mitanam mikinsa tu ngatu zazan pasu "zuma malecaday tu a kazizeng" muculil i zazan. katukuh 2013 a mihcaan, Ameylika sepat a kuwanan "Ney-huwa-ta-cow, How-cow, Cya-cow atu Mi-siken-cow" maawas tu nu hulic misulul tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2015 a mihcaan. uyni sepatay a kuwan atu How-sen-tun-Ke-lun-piya-te a kitizaan misulul tu tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng paculil i zazan a mikinsa, mikilul tu ku Wiy-ci-ni-ya-cow. 018 a mihca 3 a bulad 18 a demiad a tu labii,I Ya-li-san-na-cow-tan-pey-s, cacay lunuk paculil a kazizengay a Uber a kazizeng habelutan ku cacay nu micaliwayay i zazan a tademaw mapatay. uyni u saayaway nu kitakit a lunuk paculil a kazizang nu simapatayay nu tademaw. tizaay a tayzin mihapiw tu mihcaan nu mapatayay 49 ku mihcaan ci He-cepoke "Elaine Herzberg", kazizeng izaw ku palihalayay apaculilay, itaway muenengay i paculilan, caay kaitiza maduka. Namahini ku kawaw, mahabelutay a tademaw makay ayaw nu kazizang kawilian micuzuh tu batikal, caay henay pihaymaw paculnil atu piliyas ku nipaculil, hakay u patelac nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. patahkal ku tayzin tu niadinguan paazih, situngusa a tademaw caay piazih, itawya i labu nu kaziza pacemek niza miazih tu limaki, caay pihapinang amiazih. misetulay a kazizeng sa bu-haw XC90 SUV. Ameylika kanatak saculil a zazan nu mikuwanay "National Highway Traffic Safety Administration" i pasay zazan tu pakay saykay a nipatahkalan a kamu hinisa, uyni a sakaput "tu pakayniay a akawaw" atu yu-pu, bu-haw, lyen-pang-tang-ci,cow atu tizaay a kuwan makakaput tu" amisatudung a mikawaw. XC90 SUV. . saculilan tungus tekeday pulung nu kayadah Zipun Toyota u silac nu ngangan u icibangay, Ameylika bu-te atu tung-yumg a kazizang pazuma tu ngangan u sakatusa atu sakatulu. Pi-li-s, Ba-kow, I-tali atu Ing-kow misabalucu' amin au lunuk paculil a kazizeng ku mikawaway tu miculu' patayza, i Te-kow, He-lan atu S-pan-ya a kanatalan, misulul tu amin tu mitanam tu kakapah nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2015 a mihcaan, Ing-kow a cebu misulul tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng LUTZ Pathfinder i Mi-al-tu -kay-en-s a zazan mikinsa. yu malaheci tu keci tu lunuk paculil a kazizenge, alesan tu ku silamalay a zazan caay katahpu ku saculilan. hamin u lunuk paculil a kazizang anu tanenng pasazumaen tu nu siwbayay, amahamin mapeci pabaluhay a tabaki ku nkalilid nu syakay. lunuk paculil a kazizeng hakay katuud ku micukaymasay imahini nayi' henay ku wanta, anu tatenga' katuud ku micukaymasay, paketunay a musuayay tu ahahulakan a kawaw. uzuma a kawaw amalilid ku wayway nu miliwkuay a labang. zuma a tademaw hini sa lulunuk paculil a kazizeng amacunus ku kayaday nu kazizeng atu kinapina a micukaymas, zayhan amadayum a paculilen, saaca sangaleb amicukaymas. hakay mahiniay tu wamin ku i tuseay, amacunus ku kayadah nu teked nu micukaymasay tu kazizang. Hinisa ku zuma a tademaw, sangaleb madayum mapulung amisazakez, sakasa acaaay kahami asitungus tu kaizaw nu kazizeng, amakelul ku picukaymas, ngay u kazizeng taneng kikadadawaen tu nu ayzaay a patayza. likecś≥ēŚĺč i Ameylika, kasa kuwan a niyazu' bangu a paya nu kazizeng caay palaayaw "nika haka caay pasatezepen" i kacakat lunuk sanay a saculilan. amihapinang mikuwan tu mahiniay a saculilan, zuma a cow a cenbu misanga' tu anca mizateng a misanga' tu pakayniay nu likec. masatezep i 2013 a mihcaan, Ameylika sepat tu a cow "Ney-ba-ta-cow, Bu-cow, Cya-cow atu Mi-vu-kan-cow", atu Ke-lun-pi-ya-te kitizaan, malaheci ku nisanga' milisimet tu lunukay nu mitupinay a likec.

pakajniaj a akawaw" atu ju-pu, bu-ńßaw, r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč-taŇč- ¶i, ¶ow atu tizaaj a kuwan makakaput tu" amisatuduŇč a mikawaw. * ¶** su*. . sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan tuŇčus t…ôk…ôdaj pur~…ĺuŇč nu kajadańß zipun ¶i tu r~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč…ô, ar~…ĺ…ôsan tu ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a zazan ¶aaj katańßpu ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ńßamin u r~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kazizaŇč anu tan…ônŇč pasazuma…ôn tu nu siwbajaj, amańßamin map…ô ¶i pabar~…ĺuńßaj a tabaki ku nkar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu sjakaj. r~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč ńßakaj katuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj imańßini naji Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wanta, anu tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° katuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj, pak…ôtunaj a musuajaj tu ańßańßur~…ĺakan a kawaw. uzuma a kawaw amar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku wajwaj nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. zuma a tad…ômaw ńßini sa r~…ĺur~…ĺunuk pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč ama ¶unus ku kajadaj nu kaziz…ôŇč atu kinapina a mi ¶ukajmas, zajńßan amadajum a pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ…ôn, saa ¶a saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ami ¶ukajmas. ńßakaj mańßiniaj tu wamin ku i tus…ôaj, ama ¶unus ku kajadańß nu t…ôk…ôd nu mi ¶ukajmasaj tu kazizaŇč. ńßinisa ku zuma a tad…ômaw, saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb madajum mapur~…ĺuŇč amisazak…ôz, sakasa a ¶aaaj kańßami asituŇčus tu kaizaw nu kaziz…ôŇč, amak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku pi ¶ukajmas, Ňčaj u kaziz…ôŇč tan…ôŇč kikadadawa…ôn tu nu ajzaaj a patajza. r~…ĺik…ô ¶** i am…ôr~…ĺika, kasa kuwan a nijazu Ē~ ° baŇču a paja nu kaziz…ôŇč ¶aaj par~…ĺaajaw "nika ńßaka ¶aaj pasat…ôz…ôp…ôn" i ka ¶akat r~…ĺunuk sanaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. amińßapinaŇč mikuwan tu mańßiniaj a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, zuma a ¶ow a ¶…ônbu misaŇča Ē~ ° tu an ¶a mizat…ôŇč a misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pakajniaj nu r~…ĺik…ô ¶. masat…ôz…ôp i **** a mińß ¶aan, am…ôr~…ĺika s…ôpat tu a ¶ow "n…ô-ba-ta- ¶ow, bu- ¶ow, ¶ja- ¶ow atu mi-*u-kan- ¶ow", atu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja-t…ô kitizaan, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nisaŇča Ē~ ° mir~…ĺisim…ôt tu r~…ĺunukaj nu mitupinaj a r~…ĺik…ô ¶.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == lunuk paculil a kazizeng Ťá™ŚčēťßēťßõśĪĹŤĽä lunuk paculil a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, Autonomous vehicles,Self-driving automobile", panganga aca tu naya ku tademay paculil a kazizeng, u tinnaw ku paculilay a kazizeng, nayay ku tademaw a kazizeng, kikayay a kazizang, anca lunuk paculil a kazizeng, zuma u tademaw ku paculilay anca caay pikuwn tu kazizeng. mala u sapisuped tu paya, lunuk paculil a kazizdng kapah cay ku tademaw ku paculilay taneng a mikinsa tu hekal atu mituzu' tu pazayzaan saculilan. Ťá™ŚčēťßēťßõśĪĹŤĽä(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Autonomous vehicles,Self-driving automobile), . nilaculan katukuh 2023 amihcaan, caay kahamin u lunuk paculil a kazizdng hamin u mahizaay tu u sapacakay, hatu u mahizaay tu nu kazizeng a hekal, u nipahecek a kazizeng, anca u sapaazih a kazizeng, zuma u nalimaan ku azihen kya misataneng misanga' tu mahizaay a kazizeng, haymaw hizahiza satu. lunuk paculil a kazizeng taneng tu lye-ta, kowng-sye lye-ta, sapikinsa,GPS atu piazih tu tennaw a nalimaan mikinsa tu hekal. macakatay a pikuwan taneng mikinsa tu nisulita masumad matatungus ku saculi a zazan, atu satena' a bacu. Pakay mahini a nipaeneng atu nisanga'an tu ti-tu "SLAM" a nalimaan, pabaluhay tu zuma a sakatineng a ti-tu, ngay tulin sa mikilul ku kazizeng tu kitizaan. maawas ku yadahay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng masa nayay paculilay tu kazizeng a sakaput taneng amiwada' tu ngelu', sakasa apacakat tu saculilan a kalamkam a miculu' a patayza. lunuk paculil a kazizeng u pikinsa talaayaw tu 1920 a ziday kya a taneng mikinsa, malaheci ku zuma. saayaway a tatenga'ay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng katukuh 1980 a mihcaan kya saayaway a tahkal. 1984 a mihcaan, K-ney-ci-melung aa atalakaway a cacudadan micuzuh tu Navlab atu ALV a nisabalucu'an, 1987 a mihcaan, Me-say-te-s-Pin-s atu Mu-ni-hey lyen-pang kukub hitay a talakaway a cacudadan mapulung micuzuh tu nisabalucu'an ni Yu-li-ka-pu-low-au-siw-s. Yadah ku ay a tabakiay a kusi atu migingkuway a sakaput malingatu tu misanga' tu mahizaay tu nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, pasu Me-say-te-sa pins, tung-yung kazizeng, Talu kazizeng, lAV, meyan, Law-puw.poe-s kusi, Zipun a nisanga'an a kazizeng,ley-now, Toyuta kazizeng, Aw-ti, bu-haw sakaput, paw-s kazizeng, pa-al-ma talakaway a cacudadanay a Vislab, niw-cin talakaway a cacudadan, atu Google. zikuz nu 21 seci, m ikilul tu sapasingding a macakat, bahal satu macakat, hamin u lunuk paculil a kazizeng mitanamay tu kazizengay u masan ga'ay tu, te-s-la a kazizeng u saayaway a nipanutekan a patahkal tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2013 a mihca 7 a bulad, 2013 a mihca 7 a bulad, Vislab paazih tu BRAiVE hananay nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng, mitanam mikinsa tu ngatu zazan pasu "zuma malecaday tu a kazizeng" muculil i zazan. katukuh 2013 a mihcaan, Ameylika sepat a kuwanan "Ney-huwa-ta-cow, How-cow, Cya-cow atu Mi-siken-cow" maawas tu nu hulic misulul tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2015 a mihcaan. uyni sepatay a kuwan atu How-sen-tun-Ke-lun-piya-te a kitizaan misulul tu tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng paculil i zazan a mikinsa, mikilul tu ku Wiy-ci-ni-ya-cow. 018 a mihca 3 a bulad 18 a demiad a tu labii,I Ya-li-san-na-cow-tan-pey-s, cacay lunuk paculil a kazizengay a Uber a kazizeng habelutan ku cacay nu micaliwayay i zazan a tademaw mapatay. uyni u saayaway nu kitakit a lunuk paculil a kazizang nu simapatayay nu tademaw. tizaay a tayzin mihapiw tu mihcaan nu mapatayay 49 ku mihcaan ci He-cepoke "Elaine Herzberg", kazizeng izaw ku palihalayay apaculilay, itaway muenengay i paculilan, caay kaitiza maduka. Namahini ku kawaw, mahabelutay a tademaw makay ayaw nu kazizang kawilian micuzuh tu batikal, caay henay pihaymaw paculnil atu piliyas ku nipaculil, hakay u patelac nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. patahkal ku tayzin tu niadinguan paazih, situngusa a tademaw caay piazih, itawya i labu nu kaziza pacemek niza miazih tu limaki, caay pihapinang amiazih. misetulay a kazizeng sa bu-haw XC90 SUV. Ameylika kanatak saculil a zazan nu mikuwanay "National Highway Traffic Safety Administration" i pasay zazan tu pakay saykay a nipatahkalan a kamu hinisa, uyni a sakaput "tu pakayniay a akawaw" atu yu-pu, bu-haw, lyen-pang-tang-ci,cow atu tizaay a kuwan makakaput tu" amisatudung a mikawaw. XC90 SUV. . saculilan tungus tekeday pulung nu kayadah Zipun Toyota u silac nu ngangan u icibangay, Ameylika bu-te atu tung-yumg a kazizang pazuma tu ngangan u sakatusa atu sakatulu. Pi-li-s, Ba-kow, I-tali atu Ing-kow misabalucu' amin au lunuk paculil a kazizeng ku mikawaway tu miculu' patayza, i Te-kow, He-lan atu S-pan-ya a kanatalan, misulul tu amin tu mitanam tu kakapah nu lunuk paculil a kazizeng. 2015 a mihcaan, Ing-kow a cebu misulul tu lunuk paculil a kazizeng LUTZ Pathfinder i Mi-al-tu -kay-en-s a zazan mikinsa. yu malaheci tu keci tu lunuk paculil a kazizenge, alesan tu ku silamalay a zazan caay katahpu ku saculilan. hamin u lunuk paculil a kazizang anu tanenng pasazumaen tu nu siwbayay, amahamin mapeci pabaluhay a tabaki ku nkalilid nu syakay. lunuk paculil a kazizeng hakay katuud ku micukaymasay imahini nayi' henay ku wanta, anu tatenga' katuud ku micukaymasay, paketunay a musuayay tu ahahulakan a kawaw. uzuma a kawaw amalilid ku wayway nu miliwkuay a labang. zuma a tademaw hini sa lulunuk paculil a kazizeng amacunus ku kayaday nu kazizeng atu kinapina a micukaymas, zayhan amadayum a paculilen, saaca sangaleb amicukaymas. hakay mahiniay tu wamin ku i tuseay, amacunus ku kayadah nu teked nu micukaymasay tu kazizang. Hinisa ku zuma a tademaw, sangaleb madayum mapulung amisazakez, sakasa acaaay kahami asitungus tu kaizaw nu kazizeng, amakelul ku picukaymas, ngay u kazizeng taneng kikadadawaen tu nu ayzaay a patayza. likecś≥ēŚĺč i Ameylika, kasa kuwan a niyazu' bangu a paya nu kazizeng caay palaayaw "nika haka caay pasatezepen" i kacakat lunuk sanay a saculilan. amihapinang mikuwan tu mahiniay a saculilan, zuma a cow a cenbu misanga' tu anca mizateng a misanga' tu pakayniay nu likec. masatezep i 2013 a mihcaan, Ameylika sepat tu a cow "Ney-ba-ta-cow, Bu-cow, Cya-cow atu Mi-vu-kan-cow", atu Ke-lun-pi-ya-te kitizaan, malaheci ku nisanga' milisimet tu lunukay nu mitupinay a likec.

mir~…ĺisim…ôt tu r~…ĺunukaj nu mitupinaj a r~…ĺik…ô ¶.
